name: Fixed: Front/sides/rear
official_rules_text: To add a weapon that has the Fixed: Front/Sides/Rear keyword to an Attack Pool, the defending unit must have at least 1 of its miniatures' bases partially inside 1 of the speci/f_ied /f_iring arcs of the attacking miniature.
